title: Dice Rebuild
description: Roll the dice! A rebuild dice mod with better in-game experience!
body:
## About
**The rebuild dice mod [(Original 1.20.1 Forge Mod here)](https://modrinth.com/mod/dice) for Fabric 1.21 with better in-game content.**   

**--All the dices in game:**  

![dice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acb4db4a116457359fe43d5403e002552f6c24e1.png)
-Regular dice & Sticky dice could be thrown to roll for a random point, with a solid hitbox, the sticky one won't bounce upon touching the ground. Can be launched by dispensor.  

![dice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3269341af54eb46e4d4b1810c269ddea4a0e8ea.png)
-A piled dice pillar.  

![pile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abad18631d3e45cf43e1e315824dca2fbdd4becb.png)
**--Dice in-game features**  

-Recipe  
The regular dyed dice(Take light gray as an example):  

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df9c0933b8cc56c340ad1d44e8e6b3c81ef7679c.png)

For sticky dice:  Replace the dye slot with slime ball or honey comb.  

-The dice's three main interaction  
  (Left click) punch & push it for a new random pont  
  
  (Right click + Shift) modify the point to make it plus 1  
  
  (Left click + Shift) destroy it, in creative it won't drop  

-All the dices will be immediately destroyed via magma block.  

-The thrown dice can be glinted by holding glowstone dust in your offhand, then it can glow in the darkness, with special illuminating particles.  

![comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc3fdfc7c373f415d32560efda362db57c1010a5_0.webp)

-The dice has an nbt tag that contains the UUID of the owner who threw it. If it has an owner and the interact player(In Survival Mode) matches the UUID, it can have a full access. But if it does not contain an owner tag(dispensed by dispensor or command place), you can't modify the point. Or if the UUID is invalid, you will be denied to do any interaction.  

-You can turn it off by making the gamerule **dicePrivacy** false


**--Gambler**  

![gambler](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b7032177c5a9afa62bd1af6054ff96ec6e94b55.png)

-A neutral illager that spawn in the woodland mansion. With regular 24 Health point. Use sword in combat. Will drop the holding dice or emerald upon death. He trully **LOVES emeralds!** You can use emeralds to have a gamble match with him. Remember to bring a regular dice that holds a different color. His default lucky color is gray. In game, You and your rival will throw two dices that contains an event tag, and wait for 6 seconds, when the dices lands on the ground, the result is judged by who got the larger point. If you win, you can double the amount of the emerald you put in. If it's a fair round, you get them back with the same amount. Or if you lose, your emerald is gone forever. Don't forget to to gamble in a relatively flat land with no holes or liquids nearby, these things could interrupt the result. A dice with an event tag can not be pushed or modified, You can only destroy it.(If it's your dice, it will drop) The event use dice has a decay time, default is 4800 ticks(4 minutes). Similar to dropped item. You can adjust it by changing the gamerule **eventUseDiceDecayTime**.  

-He will be cheer up when you got emeralds in hand.  

![temp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7693879a4e16ffa95221903877bfac9d4805e438.png)

-He will be angry if you attack him or win in a single round of gamble(50% chance)

![angry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cce8bc9c839ba72addf2ed0b3b2881c673086f8a.png)

-A fair round  

![fair round](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/956ffec181117aade41c824dc92b7b4cfa86bee8.png)

**--Easter Egg**  

-Color lover  
You can change gambler's default color by giving it a name "<color-name> Dice Lover", like this:  

![color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef778bf9fa5a8428282e2da5b6cacb1ebdaf69b.png)

-Luck & Unluck  
If you have the the vanilla luck & unluck effect(high amplifier), your dice point will be influnced. You can't gamble with these two effects.  

![unluck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cec0fe404ccd0d23cb0e65bc6b9ef9ae414aff69.png)

![luck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53fa13567a1eb57259cca37473e6a55c8003f7ef.png)

**--WIP Feature**  
-Dice point detector
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/668be901caf40c4658aaf0d4cbf878b0e6720e90.png)

-A block that detects the exact sum of dice points in its front direction. The detection range lasts for 2 blocks in length. This block is unobtainable in survival as it is a wip feature.  

**-This feature needs rigorous tests to prove the stability in game, it won't be added in survival unless my fiddle could make it work properly. You can find it in your creative Redstone tab.**  

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06c1bd0ab724c656ba3faa59f7e1935d42cbb8cf.png)
